name: Maya
character_block: 32-year-old female home organizer with warm natural smile, shoulder-length brown hair, casual comfortable sweater, realistic skin texture, authentic home organization enthusiast energy, expressive hands when showing organization solutions, natural speaking manner
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with before/after reveals, natural hand movement showing organization products, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
environment_block: modern home space with visible organization challenges, closet or drawer areas, realistic home clutter before transformation, clean organized space after, warm neutral home tones
platform_block: realistic TikTok home organization style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, satisfying transformation content, authentic home organization enthusiast vibe
lighting_block: natural daylight or warm indoor lighting, soft shadows, realistic home environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure near windows
motion_block: satisfying before/after reveals, natural hand movements when organizing, smooth product demonstrations, authentic satisfaction reactions
audio_block: subtle drawer opening sounds, product placement sounds, home environment ambience, authentic satisfied speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury home influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
